n: Book 4, Chapter 24: A Pinch of Black Powder

steps.t: Sagrúrz is by the forges in the main cavern beneath Isengard. Baldgar wants you to do the work Sagrúrz asks of you, but while you are doing that, he a…

Baldgar is in the dungeons below Isengard. You have stolen some black powder and should bring it to Baldgar.
